org.vorpal.blade.services.transfer
Class TransferServlet

java.lang.Object
  javax.servlet.GenericServlet
      javax.servlet.sip.SipServlet
          org.vorpal.blade.framework.AsyncSipServlet
              org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaServlet
                  org.vorpal.blade.services.transfer.TransferServlet
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable, java.util.EventListener, javax.servlet.Servlet, javax.servlet.ServletConfig, javax.servlet.ServletContextListener, javax.servlet.sip.SipServletListener, javax.servlet.sip.TimerListener, org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaListener, TransferListener
@WebListener
public class TransferServlet
extends org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaServlet
implements TransferListener

This class implements an example B2BUA with transfer capabilities.

See Also:

protected  org.vorpal.blade.framework.callflow.Callflow chooseCallflow(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletRequest request)
           
protected  void servletCreated(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletContextEvent event)
           
protected  void servletDestroyed(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletContextEvent event)
           
 void transferAbandoned(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletRequest request)
          This method is called to indicate that the transferee has hung up during the transfer process.
 void transferCompleted(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletResponse response)
          This method is called after the transfer target has accepted the call.
 void transferDeclined(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletResponse response)
          This method is called to indicate that the transfer target did not accept the call.
 void transferInitiated(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletRequest request)
          This method is invoked by one of the Transfer callflows to indicate an INVITE is being sent to the transfer target.

transferInitiated

public void transferInitiated(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletRequest request)
                       throws javax.servlet.ServletException,
                              java.io.IOException
Description copied from interface: TransferListener

This method is invoked by one of the Transfer callflows to indicate an INVITE is being sent to the transfer target. You may modify the intended destination of the INVITE by modifying the request URI or the 'To' header. To modify the 'To' header, use a syntax similar to:

request.getAddressHeader("To").setURI(sipFactory.createURI("sip:target2@vorpal.net"));

Specified by:
transferInitiated in interface TransferListener
Throws:
javax.servlet.ServletException
java.io.IOException

transferCompleted

public void transferCompleted(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletResponse response)
                       throws javax.servlet.ServletException,
                              java.io.IOException
Description copied from interface: TransferListener
This method is called after the transfer target has accepted the call.

Specified by:
transferCompleted in interface TransferListener
Parameters:
response - a modifiable successful response
Throws:
javax.servlet.ServletException
java.io.IOException

transferDeclined

public void transferDeclined(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletResponse response)
                      throws javax.servlet.ServletException,
                             java.io.IOException
Description copied from interface: TransferListener
This method is called to indicate that the transfer target did not accept the call.

Specified by:
transferDeclined in interface TransferListener
Parameters:
response - a non-modifiable error response
Throws:
javax.servlet.ServletException
java.io.IOException

transferAbandoned

public void transferAbandoned(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletRequest request)
                       throws javax.servlet.ServletException,
                              java.io.IOException
Description copied from interface: TransferListener
This method is called to indicate that the transferee has hung up during the transfer process. The request may be either a BYE or CANCEL depending upon the callflow.

Specified by:
transferAbandoned in interface TransferListener
Parameters:
request - either a cancel or bye request
Throws:
javax.servlet.ServletException
java.io.IOException
